subject: math
activity_templates: A 5th-grade decimal place-value worksheet. 6 decimal numbers (e.g. '4.728'). For each, child writes the value of the tenths, hundredths, and thousandths digits. {{character}} points at a decimal number.
A 5th-grade adding-and-subtracting-decimals worksheet. 8 problems in stacked column form (e.g. '2.45 + 1.37', '5.6 - 2.18') with decimal alignment. 2x4 grid. {{character}} gives a thumbs up.
A 5th-grade comparing-decimals worksheet. 6 pairs of decimal numbers; child writes <, >, or = between them. A decimal place-value chart at the top. {{character}} cheers.
A 5th-grade rounding-decimals worksheet. 6 decimal numbers; child rounds each to the nearest tenth and hundredth in two boxes. {{character}} stands next to a rounding hint box.
